rule_text: Email body width is fixed at 600px, centered; sections must render edge-to-edge at exactly 600px (section.width) so assembled sections butt cleanly. Mobile breakpoint is 480px (layout.mobile_breakpoint); all multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
intent: Guarantee seamless zero-gap section assembly and predictable mobile reflow.
summary: Email body fixed 600px centered; sections edge-to-edge 600px width; mobile breakpoint 480px; multi-column layouts collapse to single column.
